message:
feat: Wire up logging and testing modules in public API

Export the newly added logging and testing modules from fastapi-core
and fastapi crates, making them available to downstream users.

fastapi-core/src/lib.rs changes:

- Declare `pub mod logging` and `pub mod testing` for module visibility
- Re-export key logging types at crate root:
  - AutoSpan: RAII span that logs duration on drop
  - LogConfig: Builder for log settings (level, format, target)
  - LogEntry: Structured log record with context fields
  - LogLevel: Five-tier severity enum
  - Span: Manual timing span for instrumentation
- Re-export key testing types at crate root:
  - CookieJar: Session persistence for test requests
  - RequestBuilder: Fluent API for constructing test requests
  - TestClient: In-process HTTP testing interface
  - TestResponse: Response wrapper with assertion helpers

fastapi/src/lib.rs changes:

- Re-export testing types directly at crate root for convenience
- Add `pub mod testing` submodule that re-exports all testing utilities
  from fastapi_core::testing, providing users with both flat and
  namespaced access patterns:
  - `use fastapi::TestClient;` (flat)
  - `use fastapi::testing::TestClient;` (namespaced)

This wiring allows users to import testing utilities directly from the
main fastapi crate without needing to depend on fastapi-core directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
